name: codex-excalidraw
description: A local Excalidraw canvas plugin for Codex App, built for AI-assisted whiteboarding, structured comments, and exports.

interface.shortDescription: Draw, edit, comment, and export a local Excalidraw whiteboard inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Excalidraw embeds a local Excalidraw-powered infinite canvas into Codex App. It keeps scene files in the active workspace, lets Codex create and modify editable hand-drawn diagrams, supports structured comments, and exports Excalidraw, PNG, SVG, and JSON files.
defaultPrompt: Open the Codex Excalidraw canvas for this project.
Draw an editable architecture diagram on the Excalidraw canvas.
Run Codex on the selected Excalidraw comment.
